args.code:
import json

# Get article IDs for Amy Jones
article_ids_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:2']
article_ids = [int(item['article_id']) for item in article_ids_result]

# Get the articles we fetched from MongoDB
articles_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:10']

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    "total_article_ids": len(article_ids),
    "fetched_articles": len(articles_result),
    "sample_article_ids": article_ids[:10]
}))

args.code:
import json

# Extract article IDs as strings since that's how they're stored in MongoDB
article_ids_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:2']
article_ids_str = [item['article_id'] for item in article_ids_result]

# Create the MongoDB query with string article IDs
print(' __RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"article_ids": article_ids_str[:10], "count": len(article_ids_str)}))

articles.title: Energy from waves  teenager wins science award
articles.description: A teenager from the San Diego, California area has won The Siemens Westinghouse Competition in Math, Science and Technology for his  quot;Gyro-Gen, quot; a machine that produces electricity from ocean waves.

articles.title: China #39;s appetite boosts BHP
articles.description: BHP Billiton, the world #39;s biggest mining company, has doubled its profits in the second half of the year on the back of booming global commodity prices.

var_functions.query_db:14.title: Carlyle Looks Toward Commercial Aerospace (Reuters)

var_functions.query_db:14.title: Oil and Economy Cloud Stocks' Outlook (Reuters)

val_args.code:
import json

# Extract article IDs as strings since that's how they're stored in MongoDB
article_ids_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:2']
article_ids_str = [item['article_id'] for item in article_ids_result]

# Create the MongoDB query with string article IDs
print(' __RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"article_ids": article_ids_str[:10], "count": len(article_ids_str)}))
